name: Special
description: A solid all-round Tediore SMG, but it is rarely the best pick compared with other models from the same maker. It does not offer standout bonuses to damage, accuracy, or reload speed. Its main advantage is steadier handling, with lower recoil thanks to the fitted Dahl muzzle.
notes:
Spawns only at green rarity or above.
Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
